docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY LI, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, EMILY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF STANLEY LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMILY ANDERSON IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE THAT HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LI, STANLEY ANDERSON, EMILY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, EMILY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
